Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jan-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Eric Turner, Judgment debtor appeared in Propria Persona
No other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED as modified: Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is granted, except for $75.00 per pay period. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Appearance:
Eric Turner, Defendant appearing In Propria Persona
